name: Composio
longDescription: Work across GitHub, Gmail, Google Calendar, Slack, Notion, Linear, and 1,000+ other apps with managed authentication and tool discovery. In ChatGPT web/app, use hosted Composio app tools. In terminal and Codex environments, the bundled skill prefers the local Composio CLI for direct SaaS work, local files, scripts, pipelines, and reproducible automation. Uncertain writes are never replayed automatically across surfaces.
starterPrompts: Summarize my unread email and draft replies.
Turn new GitHub issues into Linear tickets.
Find this week's meetings and post a Slack brief.
releaseNotes: Initial app-plus-skills submission. Combines the hosted MCP-backed Composio app with a surface-aware skill and an optional local CLI path for files, scripts, pipelines, and reproducible automation.
